statement: The high-block source operator satisfies the hypotheses of the abstract compact-compression theorem, hence the compressed source operators converge in norm.

projectionInputStatus.label: projection convergence input
projectionInputStatus.reason: Mosco projection convergence supplies P_N -> P strongly.

sourceCompactnessInputStatus.label: source compactness input
sourceCompactnessInputStatus.reason: The high-block source compactness theorem supplies compactness of S=E^*E.

abstractCompressionInputStatus.label: abstract compact-compression theorem input
abstractCompressionInputStatus.reason: The abstract theorem gives ||P_NSP_N-PSP|| -> 0 once its hypotheses are met.

highBlockCompactCompressionStatus.label: high-block compact compression
highBlockCompactCompressionStatus.reason: The projection and compactness inputs match the abstract compression theorem.

proof: Identify the Hilbert space with the completed A-high-block space.
Use Mosco projection convergence for the finite closed subspaces.
Use the source-range Hardy/Green compactness theorem for S=E^*E.
